description: You are an Aerospace Engineer at a drone delivery startup. Reconfigure the aerodynamics of the 'DELIVERY_DRONE' in the Webots world to match real-world wind-tunnel data for 15-inch carbon fiber propellers. For each of the four Propeller nodes (FRONT_RIGHT, FRONT_LEFT, REAR_RIGHT, and REAR_LEFT), set the first value of 'thrustConstants' to 0.00015, the first value of 'torqueConstants' to 0.000006, and the 'fastHelixThreshold' to 75.0. Save the updated world to /home/ga/Desktop/tuned_quadcopter.wbt.
